greeting.text: Ah, Zuzu. Good timing. The bike has been whispering at me all afternoon.

lines.speaker: Mr. Chen
lines.text: Ah, Zuzu. Good timing. The bike has been whispering at me all afternoon.

lines.speaker: Mr. Chen
lines.text: Before we touch anything, just look. Most repairs start there.

lines.speaker: Mr. Chen
lines.text: See how the chain wants to climb sideways? That's its little complaint.

lines.speaker: Mr. Chen
lines.text: Pick the tool that fits the problem. A good tool feels almost quiet in your hand.

lines.speaker: Mr. Chen
lines.text: Bikes are full of simple tricks: levers, wheels, cables, tension. Nothing fancy until it all works together.

lines.speaker: Mr. Chen
lines.text: Bridges are like bikes that hold still. Weight still needs a clean path.

lines.speaker: Mr. Chen
lines.text: Materials have moods. Wood springs, steel holds, rubber forgives.

lines.speaker: Mr. Chen
lines.text: Even plants know structure. Agave fibers don't brag. They just hold.

lines.speaker: Mr. Chen
lines.text: You noticed the important part before I pointed at it. That's a mechanic's eye.

dialogue_tree.text: Ah, Zuzu. Good timing. The bike has been whispering at me all afternoon.
Before we touch anything, just look. Most repairs start there.
See how the chain wants to climb sideways? That's its little complaint.
Pick the tool that fits the problem. A good tool feels almost quiet in your hand.
Bikes are full of simple tricks: levers, wheels, cables, tension. Nothing fancy until it all works together.
Bridges are like bikes that hold still. Weight still needs a clean path.
Materials have moods. Wood springs, steel holds, rubber forgives.
Even plants know structure. Agave fibers don't brag. They just hold.
You noticed the important part before I pointed at it. That's a mechanic's eye.
